title: Run Info Artefact
description: Schema for run_info.json — per-run metadata written by the benchmark executor at the end of each run. Lives at item{N}/r{K}/run_info.json.

run_hash.description: Short content-addressable hash identifying this run's content.

run_idx.description: 0-based run index within the item (r{run_idx+1} folder name).

model.description: LLM model identifier used for this run, or empty string.

api_base.description: API base URL used for this run, or empty string.

prompt.description: Task prompt presented to the MAS for this run.

error.description: Error message when status is 'error', empty string otherwise.

recorded_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when this run_info was written.
